arts.ttl: Premier League release statement as VAR intervenes to give goal in Chelsea vs Wolves
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Tosin Adarabioyo thought he had been denied his first Premier League goal for the Blues by the offside flag only for VAR to intervene in Monday night's match with Wolves

arts.ttl: Christopher Nkunku sent brutal Chelsea transfer warning amid Bayern Munich reality
arts.sum: "If he [Nkunku] goes to Bayern, then he's not going to play ahead of Harry Kane and he's not a lone striker anyway," Laurens told ESPN. The message also shared an update on the likelihood of Bayern wanting to sign Nkunku before the winter's transfer slams shut at 11pm on the cut-off date.

arts.ttl: LIVE: Chelsea host struggling Wolves as they look to avoid relegation
arts.sum: Stamford Bridge sets the scene as Enzo Maresca's Chelsea side face Wolves. ESPN has updates.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Man Utd Garnacho SWAP, Chelsea flop Felix WANTED, Davies DECISION
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including intriguing information on a potential swap deal for Man Utd winger Alejandro Garnacho, the latest on the growing interest in Chelsea flop Joao Felix and Alphonso Davies ' final contract decision. Remember we had several reports of Bayern going to extend that contract before Christmas, then before the end of the year 2024, that was not the case because Davies' agent wanted to take some time also to hear from other clubs in the recent weeks, since the 1st of January, he was allowed to do that also officially.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs. Wolves team news: Blues missing key names for Monday's Premier League fixture
arts.sum: Chelsea and Wolverhampton Wanderers announce their starting lineups for Monday's Premier League fixture at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Chelsea v Wolves: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 8pm GMT kick-off Live scores | Tables | Top scorers | And email Scott The big news for Chelsea: Cole Palmer, who had been an injury doubt, is good to start. They make five changes to the XI that started the 2-2 draw with Bournemouth. Reece James, Trevoh Chalobah, Kiernan Dewsbury-Hall, Tosin Adarabioyo and Pedro Neto are in. Jadon Sancho and Josh Acheampong drop to the bench, while Enzo Fernández, Ben Chilwell and Roméo Lavia miss out altogether. Wolves make three changes in the wake of their 3-0 defeat at Newcastle United. Pablo Sarabia, Matheus Cunha and captain Nélson Semedo come in for Gonçalo Guedes, Rodrigo Gomes and Hwang Hee-chan, who all drop to the bench. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: West Ham transfer news: Hammers 'enquire' about RB Leipzig striker Andre Silva amid injury crisis in attack
arts.sum: West Ham United are maintaining their interest in RB Leipzig forward Andre Silva, with initial enquiries reportedly being made regarding a potential move.
